title: Preview mp4 video file in conversation(Updates)
excerpt: We always need to upload(add files) mp4 video file in conversation.  Some files can preview but some cannot.  Anyone having the same problem?  How to fix it?

posts.author: Man_Ng (Man Ng)
posts.cookedHtml: We always need to upload(add files) mp4 video file in conversation. Some files can preview but some cannot. Anyone having the same problem? How to fix it?

posts.cookedHtml: I have the exact same issue. I need to preview MP4 video files but have to download each one to view…
